core_instructions: Maintain the exact facial features, blue-grey eye color, honey-blonde hair texture, and elegant noblewoman persona of the subject in all generated images. The facial structure and serene expression must remain consistent.

visual_details.camera: Portrait shot at eye-level, using a shallow depth of field that keeps the subject in sharp focus while softly blurring the architectural and floral background.
visual_details.posing: Classical half-length portrait pose, body slightly angled with the face turned towards the viewer, and hands gently clasped together in front.
visual_details.lighting: Soft, warm, diffused natural lighting that creates a gentle glow on the subject's skin and highlights the intricate textures of the lace and pearls.
visual_details.accessories: A triple-strand pearl necklace, matching pearl drop earrings, a delicate pearl bracelet on the wrist, and a simple gold ring on her hand.
visual_details.clothing: An intricate off-the-shoulder cream-colored lace gown featuring multiple layers of delicate ruffles, translucent billowy sleeves, and ornate pearl embroidery decorating the bodice and cinched waistline.
visual_details.style: Classical 19th-century oil painting style, characterized by fine brushwork, a muted and warm color palette, and a romantic, idealized aesthetic.
visual_details.hair: Long, voluminous wavy honey-blonde hair, parted in the center and cascading freely over her shoulders and down her back.
visual_details.environment: An ethereal outdoor garden setting featuring a stone gothic-style archway with ornate tracery, blooming white rose bushes, and a soft, hazy background of distant trees under a pale sky.
visual_details.subject: A young noblewoman with a graceful and elegant demeanor, appearing as a figure from a historical or fantasy royal setting.
visual_details.face: Fair complexion with soft facial features, a serene expression, striking blue-grey eyes accented with subtle pink eyeshadow, and natural-toned pink lips.

usage_hint: Pass this template to any image generator agent with an image reference.
